channel.title: Advocacy on Kelly and Coffee
channel.description: Recent content in Advocacy on Kelly and Coffee

item.title: Why I Want to Talk About This Out Loud
item.description: For most of my career I worked hard at being unremarkable. Not at the job — at being a person at the job. I kept the queer parts and the neurodivergent parts folded away where they couldn’t cost me anything, and I told myself that was professionalism. It wasn’t. It was camouflage, and it was exhausting, and it quietly taught everyone around me that people like me apparently don’t exist in tech.
